posts.author: BreakfastGun
posts.title: Teacher humiliates a 6 YEAR OLD student by making him a certificate reading, "Most Likely to Become a Dictator", because he expressed conservative values.

twitter.content:
A teacher explained that a 6-year-old boy “expressed conservative values” in class.

His teacher made him a special certificate:

“Most Likely to Become a Dictator”

Then presented it in front of the entire class… while kids called him a “Naziphile.”

This is not education.
